message:
test(policy-diagnostics): add 15-test proptest suite for health check invariants

Property-based tests covering structural correctness of all 14
PolicyEngine health checks: check count stability, ID uniqueness and
namespacing, display name/summary non-emptiness, JSON serialization
roundtrip, idempotent statuses, quarantine state escalation, remediation
hint completeness, and HealthCheckRegistry integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
